title: PlayerEmotes
description: A datapack that adds emotes to your game. No resource pack required!
body:
🎭 Player Emotes Datapack

The Player Emotes Datapack adds fun, animated emotes to your Minecraft world—no mods needed! Players can express themselves with visual effects, particles and actions using simple commands.
✨ Features:

🔹 Custom Emotes like: happy, sad, angry, cry, and more.
🌟 Emotes trigger particles, animations, and messages.
💬 Optional emote activation messages, e.g. "Your Happy emote is activated!"
🧍 Works in multiplayer – each player can run their own emotes!
🏷 Supports emote tags for organizing by emotion, decoration, or type.
⚙️ Easily extensible – you can add your own emotes with custom effects!

📜 Usage:

Run /function emotes:<emote_name>
Example: /function emotes:happy

You can clear your current emote by
/function emotes:clear

💡 Example Emotes:
Happy: Shows happy face on your head
Angry: Shows angry face on your head
Sad: Shows sad face on your head
Cry: Shows falling water particle at your eyes
and it has more emotes

🔧 Requirements:
Minecraft Java Edition 1.20+ (1.21+ support soon)
Datapack installation in the /datapacks folder

🐛 Bugs:
If you found a bug, please contact the owner in discord
my discord username is .7catta
